title: Ticket queue UI is overloaded
body: Custom views are a maze; new agents can't find their queue without an internal walkthrough.
author: Internal Rev

title: Macros stopped working after the May update
body: Two macros that worked Friday were broken Monday. Support said 'we're tracking it'. Six weeks later it's still tracking.
author: Frustrated User

title: Pricing for AI add-on is opaque
body: $25/agent on top of the base tier, with no clear value calculation. Sales kept dodging the question.
author: CSV Reviewer
